name: health-check
description: Universal, configurable health-check + healer board for any system.

plugins.name: health-check-plugin
plugins.description: Universal, configurable health-check + healer board for any system. Collects signals (Postgres/HTTP/shell/custom), scores 0-100, dedups issues, reports to Discord/Slack, files GitHub issues on approval, runs safety-gated auto-heals, and opens PRs. CLI + Claude Code / Codex / Gemini.
